title: guenthera repanda subsp. maritima
intro: Guenthera repanda subsp. maritima, also known as coastal Guenthera or Guenthera maritima, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Guenthera repanda subsp. maritima is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
